Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseMultiplier_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the base multiplier for telemetry data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances data accuracy for better insights into game performance and player behavior.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryRandomOffsetRangeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adds a random delay to telemetry data retries.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances data collection accuracy by preventing data overload during peak times.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the time the system waits before retrying data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the reliability of data tracking for better game performance insights.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxBackoffTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Defines the maximum time for retrying telemetry data transmission in milliseconds.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data reliability and performance by managing how often data is sent back to Roblox servers.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxConcurrentRetriedRequests_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of retry attempts for telemetry requests.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the reliability of data collection for better game performance insights.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxElapsedTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a maximum time limit for tracking performance data.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps improve game performance by ensuring telemetry data is collected efficiently.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxRetryAttempts_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets the maximum number of retry attempts for telemetry data sending.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data reliability by ensuring more attempts to send important game data.

Added_Other.name: FFlagRbxTelemetryEnableHttpRetries3_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables the system to retry HTTP requests up to three times if they fail.
Added_Other.purpose: Increases the reliability of data transmission, ensuring that important game data is not lost due to temporary issues.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnConnectFail_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Retries connection attempts when telemetry fails.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves connection reliability for players.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnDnsResolve_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Retries DNS resolution for telemetry data if the first attempt fails.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the reliability of data collection, helping developers understand player behavior better.
